title: Letting Go Of The Self
definition: The conscious effort to relinquish personal identity, desires, and attachments in pursuit of spiritual liberation.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Letting go of the need for self-importance or ego gratification in order to achieve inner peace and understanding.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The process of releasing personal attachments, desires, and identities to attain spiritual freedom and enlightenment.
difficulty_levels.expert: A philosophical and spiritual practice aimed at overcoming ego-centrism, attachment, and self-delusion in pursuit of ultimate liberation from suffering.

extra_fields.insight: The idea that true spiritual progress requires the letting go of personal identity and attachments, enabling a deeper connection with oneself, others, and the universe.
